# distill
> Distill monitors AI-agent sessions (Claude/Codex), identifies recurring patterns, and turns them into reusable skills.

## Preferred for AI agents: one-shot JSON flows (non-interactive)
- Onboarding: `distill onboard --write-json onboarding.json` then `distill onboard --apply-json onboarding.json`
- Review: `distill review --write-json review.json` then `distill review --apply-json review.json`
- MCP convert V4 (backend-agnostic Codex/Claude, real runtime probes):
  - `distill convert <server-id|server-name> --json`
  - `distill convert discover <server-id|server-name> --out dossier.json --json [--backend codex|claude] [--backend-auto] [--backend-health] [--config <path>]`
  - `distill convert build --from-dossier dossier.json --json [--skills-dir <path>]`
  - `distill convert contract-test --from-dossier dossier.json --json [--report <path>] [--allow-side-effects] [--probe-timeout-seconds <N>] [--probe-retries <N>]`
  - `distill convert apply --from-dossier dossier.json --yes --json [--skills-dir <path>]`
  - legacy diagnostics still available: `distill convert list|inspect|plan|verify ...`
- Backend health/selection checks:
  - `distill convert discover <server> --backend-health --backend codex --json`
  - `distill convert discover <server> --backend-health --backend claude --json`
- Backend config keys in `~/.distill/config.yaml`:
  - `convert.backend_preference: auto|codex|claude`
  - `convert.backend_timeout_seconds`
  - `convert.backend_chunk_size`
  - `convert.probe_timeout_seconds`
  - `convert.probe_retries`
  - `convert.allow_side_effect_probes`
- In `review.json`, set each proposal `decision` to `accept`, `reject`, or `skip` (missing decisions default to `skip`)
- Use `-` as path for stdio: `--write-json -` (stdout), `--apply-json -` (stdin)

## Other useful commands
- `distill scan --now` to generate proposal files immediately
- `distill convert <server>` for full one-shot V4 conversion (discover -> build -> runtime contract-test -> apply)
- `distill status` to inspect config, pending proposals, and last scan
- `distill watch --install|--uninstall` to manage scheduled scans
- `distill notify --check` for shell-hook notification checks

## JSON and docs references
- `examples/onboarding.json` and `examples/review.json` (schema examples, `format_version: 1`)
- `README.md` for user docs
- `AGENTS.md` for agent operating rules in this repo

## Runtime data
- `~/.distill/config.yaml`
- `~/.distill/proposals/`
- `~/.distill/skills/`
- `~/.distill/history/decisions.jsonl`
- V3 convert skill target default: `~/.agents/skills/`
